item.title: Can I Ask My Brother to Have His Racist Prison Tattoo Removed?
item.description: I know that some tattoo artists will cover white-supremacist tattoos at no cost for those who have disavowed such views.

item.title: For a Certain Kind of Guy, Even a Diaper Bag Needs to Be ‘Tactical’
item.description: How the marketing term turned seemingly everything into a battle-ready product.

item.title: A Gun Derailed My Childhood. As an Adult, I Found Relief at the Range.
item.description: The guilt of my teenage conviction haunted me for decades. Learning to shoot helped me forgive myself as an adult.

item.title: A Very American Controversy on the Art World’s Biggest Stage
item.description: Trump has taken an active role in the arts in his second term, which may be evident in the work on display at the Venice Biennale — depending on how you look at it.

item.title: A.I. Populism Is Here. And No One Is Ready.
item.description: Silicon Valley oligarchs worried about the risks their technology posed to the world. They forgot about people.

item.title: Can You Sneak Chocolate Chips From the Pantry?
item.description: A ruling on a dispute over purloined baking ingredients.

item.title: What if You Could Give Your Dog a Longer Life?
item.description: The business of pet longevity is booming — driven, in part, by experimental treatments that might also have implications for us.

item.title: Is It Wrong to Work for a Charity That’s Funded by a Questionable Source?
item.description: It feels as if I would be helping to burnish the reputation of someone whose actions and public statements I deeply disapprove of.

item.title: My Sister’s Alcoholism Is Putting Her Grandson at Risk. What Should I Do?
item.description: He has discovered her unconscious on more than one occasion.

item.title: Does a House Really Need Rugs?
item.description: A ruling on a home-décor dispute.

item.title: What to Know About the New Obsession With Testosterone
item.description: From politics to influencers and beyond, the hormone is being used not just for medical reasons but in pursuit of a new masculine ideal.

item.title: The Testosterone Moment Is Here. And Men May Never Look the Same.
item.description: From the Trump administration to online influencers, the hormone is increasingly seen as the key to achieving a new male ideal.

item.title: Why ‘Smart’ Products Have Started to Look Like the Dumb Choice
item.description: How Wi-Fi-connecting, app-based tech led to a backlash in the name of simplicity.

item.title: The Strange Alliance Trying to Remake American Psychiatry
item.description: The Department of Health and critical psychiatry activists are hoping to upend 40 years of medical orthodoxy.
